title: Downtown Culver City
excerpt: We've been really enjoying our neighborhood lately. Ever since this post and closing on our house almost exactly a year ago, we've slowly been exploring all that this awesome place has to offer. We love the farmer's market that happens…
body:
We've been really enjoying our neighborhood lately. Ever since this post and closing on our house almost exactly a year ago, we've slowly been exploring all that this awesome place has to offer. We love the farmer's market that happens on Tuesday afternoons, the family friendly restaurants - Tender Greens, East Borough, Native Foods, and Public School. Jack and I occasionally stroll around town in the afternoons. Though these days he is very much into the idea of being out of the stroller.

Photos by Ann-Marie Espinoza || Jack's anchor onesie is one of our designs from 7-8 years ago. Scarf was a gift from my cousin, Cindy. And yes, we love our Britax B-Agile stroller and Skip Hop diaper bag.
